D

data - Variable in class heif.boxes.ItemDataBox
 
dataEntry - Variable in class heif.boxes.DataInformationBox.DataReferenceBox
 
DataEntryBox(Box, BinaryInput) - Constructor for class heif.boxes.DataInformationBox.DataEntryBox
 
DataInformationBox - Class in heif.boxes
This derived Box class handles the Box identified as dinf - Data Information Box.
DataInformationBox(Box, BinaryInput) - Constructor for class heif.boxes.DataInformationBox
This constructor creates a derived Box object, providing additional information from other contained boxes, specifically dref - Data Reference Box and its nested contained boxes, where further additional information on URL location and name is provided.
DataInformationBox.DataEntryBox - Class in heif.boxes
An inner class used to store a DataEntryBox object, containing information such as URL/URN location and name.
DataInformationBox.DataReferenceBox - Class in heif.boxes
An inner class designed to fill up the dref box type.
dataLoaded - Variable in class heif.HeifParser
 
dataLoaded - Variable in class jpg.JpgParser
 
dataLoaded - Variable in class png.PngParser
 
dataLoaded - Variable in class tif.TifParser
 
dataLoaded - Variable in class webp.WebpParser
 
dataOffset - Variable in class webp.WebpChunk

dataReferenceIndex - Variable in class heif.boxes.ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry

dataType - Variable in enum tif.TifFieldType
 
dataTypeinRange(int) - Static method in enum tif.TifFieldType
Verifies if the given data type code is a valid type defined in this enumeration (TYPE_BYTE_U through TYPE_IFD_POINTER).

DATETAKEN - Static variable in class batch.BatchMetadataUtils
 
day - Variable in class png.PngChunkTIME

Enables or disables debug mode for more verbose logging.
debug - Variable in class batch.BatchConfiguration
 
decodeByteArray(Taggable, byte[]) - Static method in class tif.TagValueConverter
Decodes a raw byte array into a human-readable string based on the tag's hint.
decodeGpsArray(RationalNumber[], Taggable, DirectoryIFD) - Static method in class tif.GpsDataManager
 
decodeGpsArray(RationalNumber[], Taggable, DirectoryIFD) - Static method in class tif.GpsDataManager2
 
decodeString(Taggable, String) - Static method in class tif.TagValueConverter
Decodes a string value.
decodeUserComment(byte[]) - Static method in class tif.TagValueConverter
Decodes encoded strings containing an 8-byte charset identifier.

Configures the sorting order of processed media records.

description - Variable in enum jpg.JpgSegmentConstants
 
description - Variable in enum png.ChunkType
 
description - Variable in enum tif.DirectoryIdentifier
 
description - Variable in enum tif.TagHint
 
description - Variable in enum tif.TifFieldType
 
description - Variable in enum webp.WebPChunkType
 
detectFormat(String) - Static method in enum common.DigitalSignature
Detects the file signature based on magic numbers.
detectFormat(Path) - Static method in enum common.DigitalSignature
Detects the file signature based on magic numbers.
DigitalSignature - Enum in common
Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
DigitalSignature(String, int[][]) - Constructor for enum common.DigitalSignature
 
Directory<T> - Interface in common
Represents a generic collection or directory of entries of a specific type.
directory - Variable in class tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Unknown
 
DirectoryIdentifier - Enum in tif
Enumerates and identifies Image File Directory (IFD) types found within TIFF and EXIF data structures.
DirectoryIdentifier(String) - Constructor for enum tif.DirectoryIdentifier
This private constructor is implicitly called to initialise every directory with a distinct enumeration value given.
DirectoryIFD - Class in tif
A collection-based representation of a TIFF Image File Directory (IFD).
DirectoryIFD(DirectoryIdentifier) - Constructor for class tif.DirectoryIFD
Constructs a new directory instance for a specific directory type.
DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD - Class in tif
Represents a single metadata entry within an Image File Directory.
directoryList - Variable in class tif.IFDHandler
 
directoryType - Variable in class tif.DirectoryIFD
 
displayAllMarkers() - Static method in enum jpg.JpgSegmentConstants
Displays all defined JPEG markers with their description.
displayHierarchy() - Method in class heif.BoxHandler
Displays all box types in a hierarchical fashion, useful for debugging, visualisation or diagnostics.
DisplayMetadata - Class in batch
Utility class to print media metadata in a format emulating the output style of exiftool -G1 -a -s -u.
DisplayMetadata(BatchConfiguration) - Constructor for class batch.DisplayMetadata
Creates an instance for displaying metadata name/value attributes, similar to the output format produced by exiftool -G1 -a -s -u.
displayPngMetadata(PngMetadataProvider) - Method in class batch.DisplayMetadata
 
displaySystemMetadata(Path) - Method in class batch.DisplayMetadata
Displays file system attributes for the specified path using the standard [System] metadata group.
displayTifMetadata(TifMetadataProvider) - Method in class batch.DisplayMetadata
Displays metadata contained within a TIFF-based metadata structure.
DIVIDER - Static variable in class common.MetadataConstants
Separator line used for visual distinction between directories.
divisor - Variable in class tif.RationalNumber
 
doc - Variable in class xmp.XmpHandlerOld
 
doubleValue() - Method in class tif.RationalNumber
Returns the double-precision floating-point representation of the rational number.
dref - Variable in class heif.boxes.DataInformationBox
 
DTF - Static variable in class batch.DisplayMetadata
